examples:
Command Example
!cylance-protect-get-device-threats id=6033f7a1-e66c-4aef-9c7d-ed454457d071 pageNumber=2 pageSize=75
Raw Output
{
"classification":"Malware",
"cylance_score":-1,
"date_found":"2017-11-21T17:34:51",
"file_path":"C:\\$Recycle.Bin\\S-1-5-21-3378384064-522475393-1698893855-1001\\$RPJNCM8\\artifacts\\2017-08-12-Trickbot-binary-from-usdata.estoreseller.com.exe",
name: cylance-protect-get-device-threats

outputs.description: Cylance threat classification assigned to the threat File.CylanceScore Cylance score assigned to the threat
outputs.name: File.Classification

outputs.description: Date and time (in UTC) when the threat was found on the device File.FilePath File path where the threat was found on the device
outputs.name: File.DateFound

outputs.description: Current status of the file on the device. 0 = Default 1 = Quarantined
outputs.name: File.FileStatus

outputs.description: Threat name File.Sha256 SHA-256 has for the threat
outputs.name: File.Name

outputs.description: Cylance threat sub-classification assigned to the threat DBotScore.Indicator Tested indicator
outputs.name: File.SubClassification

outputs.description: Indicator type DBotScore.Vendor Vendor used to calculate the score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
